LIVE MUSICCoverage / documentation / editorial

The room, the performer,
and everything between.

Available for live coverage, tour documentation, festival stories, press and editorial assignments, backstage access, and artist portraits where the work supports it.

This starter demonstrates three sequence slots and standalone hero frames. Replace them with 18–30 approved images only when the archive supports that length.
